title: chore: update app metrics 2026-05-31
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Polly did her daily rounds, watering the apps and updating the community metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in the APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md files.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app directory reflects the latest health and usage data.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a gardener, checking on pixelated code-plants in a greenhouse. She has a tiny clipboard to represent the metrics update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, holding a small clipboard while inspecting glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
